results.title: DEON: Court affirms FCCPC’s consumer protection role, says telecom licensing belongs to NCC
results.description: The Federal High Court, Lagos, has affirmed the Federal Competition and Consumer Protection Commission’s (FCCPC) powers to regulate competition and consumer protection in the telecommunications sector, while ruling that the licensing of telecom operators remains the exclusive responsibility of the Nigerian Communications Commission (NCC). The post DEON: Court affirms FCCPC’s consumer protection role, says telecom licensing belongs to NCC appeared first on The Sun Nigeria .

results.title: 30 Elegant Vintage Beverage Ads From the Early 1900s
results.description: These elegant vintage advertisements provide a captivating look at beverage marketing during the early 1900s. Featuring beautifully illustrated posters and prints for sodas, coffees, teas, wines, and tonics, the ads showcase the artistic creativity and sophisticated marketing style of the era. With their refined typography, charming illustrations, and persuasive messages, these pieces not only promoted popular drinks but also reflected the optimism, fashion, and rising consumer culture of the Edwardian and early Art Deco periods. A delightful visual collection that captures the golden age of advertising. Absinthe Blanqui, Nice, circa 1900 Absinthe de Pontarlier, Cousin Jeune, Paris, circa 1900 Bière de l'Eclair, 1900 Birra Poretti, 1900 Bitter Campari, 1900 See more »

results.title: Killing of 4 Indian seafarers in Ukraine: India summons Russian charge d'affaires
results.description: India summoned the Russian charge d'affaires to protest the killing of four Indian seafarers. The civilian vessel was attacked by Russian cruise missiles near Ukraine's coast. Four Indian nationals tragically lost their lives in this incident. One Indian national is currently hospitalized in critical condition. India condemned the targeting of commercial shipping and civilian crew members.

results.title: 'Ramayana' release date revealed in trailer? Ranbir Kapoor, Yash starrer set for November 8 release, to CLASH with 'Godzilla: Minus Zero'
results.description: The Ramayana film trailer has garnered positive reactions from industry insiders. A recent review suggests a November 8 release date for the epic. This potential release date sets up a box office clash with Godzilla: Minus Zero. Godzilla: Minus Zero is scheduled to open globally on November 6, 2026. Both films are highly anticipated cinematic spectacles for 2026.

results.title: New YouTube guidelines are looking to end AI slop and clickbait traps
results.description: In a decisive move to protect viewer feeds and advertiser dollars, YouTube has updated its monetization guidelines to strip cash flow from low-quality, AI-generated material. The streaming giant is refining the rules governing its lucrative YouTube Partner Program (YPP) to specifically target “inauthentic content” designed solely for low-effort content farming. results.title: 70 detained, 118 cops and 60 marchers Injured: Police block protesters' march to Parliament; JP Nadda meets CJP representatives
results.description: A protest by the Cockroach Janta Party demanding a minister's resignation turned chaotic. Protesters clashed with police, resulting in numerous injuries on both sides. Police reported detentions and filed charges related to rioting and assault on public servants. The BJP blamed Left-affiliated student groups for instigating the organized violence. Investigations are underway to establish criminal responsibility for the disturbances.

results.title: DEA’s Rocky Mountain Division seized one in every six U.S. fentanyl pills this year
results.description: STATEWIDE, Colo. (KRDO) -- The Drug Enforcement Administration's (DEA) Rocky Mountain Field Division (RMFD) says one in every six fentanyl pills seized in the U.S. to date this year have been from their office. According to the DEA, the division, which consists of Colorado, Utah, Wyoming and Montana, has seized over 3.2 million fentanyl pills The post DEA’s Rocky Mountain Division seized one in every six U.S. fentanyl pills this year appeared first on KRDO .
